root.speaker: The Reader of Lines
root.text:
Everything you have spoken, written down. I read it
back when the hold is quiet.

all.speaker: The Reader of Lines
all.text:
Every command, in order. Some of these tablets are
older than the kin who first carved them.

mistakes.speaker: The Reader of Lines
mistakes.text:
Especially the mistakes. The mistakes are how we know
what we meant.

props.message:
Tablet carved by a steady hand:

`sudo apt update`

Tablet carved by a tired hand:

`make`

Tablet near a small disturbed crater in the floor:

`rm -rf node_modules`

Tablet carved like a question:

`history | grep wyrd`

A long thin hall. The tablets continue past where you can see.

Every command Tux has ever spoken. Walls of text.
